trending_videos.title: Warhammer 40,000: Darktide - Skitarii | Class Reveal Trailer
trending_videos.description:
The Skitarii class is coming to Warhammer 40,000: Darktide June 23.

Wishlist now on Steam:
► https://fatshark.games/08TKqZ

The Adeptus Mechanicus will not see the secrets of Hive Tertium fall into the hands of heretics, the Skitarii Alpha Primus are elite operatives devoted to serving the will of the Omnissiah. They will annihilate all who stand in their way.

Learn more about Darktide's new class
► https://fatshark.games/lfMTcr

Don't miss the massive savings during Warhammer Skulls (May 21-28) on all Fatshark Warhammer games, DLCs and digital upgrades. 
► https://fatshark.games/8ItMLU

Check out the new Arbites and Hive Scum class bundle on Steam.
► https://fatshark.games/SdXaV0

________________________________________________________________________________________

Learn more about Darktide on the official website:
► https://fatshark.games/HdwS01

Subscribe to the Darktide newsletter
► https://fatshark.games/rzGOql

Follow the Darktide socials
► https://fatshark.games/N8eiJB

trending_videos.title: Cleveland Cavaliers at New York Knicks
trending_videos.description: The New York Knicks and Cleveland Cavaliers collide in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference Finals. New York leads 1-0 after a 115-104 OT win led by Jalen Brunson's 38 points. Donovan Mitchell and Karl-Anthony Towns tip off at Madison Square Garden.

trending_videos.description:

trending_videos.title: Montreal Canadiens at Carolina Hurricanes
trending_videos.description: The Montreal Canadiens and Carolina Hurricanes battle in Game 1 of the Eastern Finals. Coach Martin St. Louis and Lane Hutson bring a top power play against a stout penalty kill led by coach Rod Brind'Amour and Frederik Andersen in Raleigh.

trending_videos.title: Lucky Strike | Official Trailer | In Theaters June 26
trending_videos.description:
Inspired by true events, Lucky Strike tells the story of one soldier trapped behind enemy lines during the last major German offensive during WWII, what will become known as The Battle of the Bulge. Armed only with his Motorola SCR-300 radio, a new technology only battle-ready near the end of the war, he must use his wits and spy craft to thwart the advancing Nazi Panzer army and find his way back home. 

The film reunites director Rod Lurie, producer Marc Frydman and star and producer Scott Eastwood following their acclaimed film The Outpost.

trending_videos.title: Gutfeld!
trending_videos.description: Greg Gutfeld looks at the news of the day through a satiric lens fused with pop culture and features his takes on the day's headlines.

trending_videos.title: The CJ Cup Byron Nelson, First Round
trending_videos.description: The opening round of the PGA Tour Byron Nelson tournament tees off at TPC Craig Ranch. Defending 2025 champion Scottie Scheffler navigates the field as marquee morning pairings begin 72 holes of stroke play today in McKinney, Texas.

trending_videos.title: PRESIDENT - DOOM LOOP
trending_videos.description:
C I T I Z E N S,

The debut full-length address:

B L O O D  O F  Y O U R  E M P I R E

is now available to pre-order via  https://www.presidentband.com

D O O M  L O O P, the latest transmission, is out now.

The campaign escalates.

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks,

gaming.insight: Gaming content continues to be a strong performer, with both game trailers and creative gameplay simulation drawing significant attention.

sports.insight: Sports events, especially those involving popular teams or tournaments, consistently attract large audiences. Highlighting key matchups or unique sports moments can enhance engagement.

entertainment.insight: Trailers for upcoming shows or movies generate significant attention, particularly when tied to popular franchises or intriguing storylines.

news/political_commentary.insight: Political commentary and news satire can attract audiences by providing unique perspectives or humor on current events.

single_video_channels.insight: Channels that focus on a specific niche or event, even with a single video, can achieve trending status if the content is timely and relevant.

gaming.opportunity: Leverage the popularity of game trailers and in-game simulations by creating content that explores game mechanics or community challenges.

sports.opportunity: Capitalize on interest in major sporting events by offering exclusive behind-the-scenes content or expert analysis.

entertainment.opportunity: Develop engaging content around upcoming movies or TV shows, including reviews, breakdowns, or fan theories.

news/political_commentary.opportunity: Expand on current events with in-depth analysis or comedic takes to capture audiences looking for alternative perspectives.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
